chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional & Electronics Support Groups /share/b/pub/verilog.help May 4, 2004 CONTENTS Icarus Verilog Cadence

May 4, 2004 CONTENTS Icarus Verilog Cadence Verilog Icarus Verilog -------------- The Icarus verilog programs are installed on Solaris SPARC and x86 systems. Version 0.7 is the default; commands include /usr/sww/bin/iverilog /usr/s

mmands include /usr/sww/bin/iverilog /usr/sww/bin/iverilog-vpi /usr/sww/bin/vvp To use the older version type the following (only works on Sparc): /usr/sww/bin/iverilog-0.6 /usr/sww/bin/vvp-0.6 Documentation: http://icarus.com

n/vvp-0.6 Documentation: http://icarus.com/eda/verilog/ http://icarus.com/eda/verilog/FAQ.html man -M /usr/sww/pkg/verilog/man iverilog man -M /usr/sww/pkg/verilog/man vvp man -M /usr/sww/pkg/verilog-0.6.1/man iverilog m

n -M /usr/sww/pkg/verilog-0.6.1/man iverilog man -M /usr/sww/pkg/verilog-0.6.1/man vvp Sources: ftp://ftp.gnu.org/gnu/gperf/gperf-2.7.2.tar.gz ftp://icarus.com/pub/eda/verilog/v0.6/verilog-0.6.1.tar.gz Cadence Verilog --------------

log-0.6.1.tar.gz Cadence Verilog --------------- Verilog is a tool within Cadence, which is available to EECS Instructional users (see /share/b/pub/cadence.help). Here are UNIX commands for starting a Cadence program on UNIX: % sourc

tarting a Cadence program on UNIX: % source /share/n/cadence/cadence.cshrc % verilog -gui & click Help--> User Guide to get the User Guide window click Help--> Reference Manuals to get the Reference Manuals window See /sha
ls to get the Reference Manuals window See /share/b/pub/cadence.help for more information. EECS Instructional Support Group 378/384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
